description: Create structured knowledge notes in Obsidian-compatible format with proper frontmatter, sections, and linking

evals.prompt: Add a note about event-driven architecture to my knowledge base
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/architecture/event-driven-architecture.md with proper frontmatter (type, category, tags), all required sections (Overview, Purpose, Content, Usage), at least one [[link]] to related notes

evals.prompt: I just learned about the adapter pattern, can you document it?
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/programming/adapter-pattern.md with clear explanation, practical example, and links to related patterns like decorator or facade

evals.prompt: Create a quick reference card for Docker commands I use often
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/devops/docker-commands.md as a reference type note with categorized command examples
